rows.label: qev091603_MSG0001
rows.name: Welcome back! I've been waiting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0002
rows.name:
You have? Whatever.
Listen, we need to talk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0003
rows.name: Right, the Murderess filled me in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0004
rows.name: Oh did she now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's right. She told me I
should be expecting you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0006
rows.name:
And she said to make sure
I got you this reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0007
rows.name: She what?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmm? I-is something the matter?
You assisted the Murderess
on her mission, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_JNK0010
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev091603_SEL0011
rows.name:
Put aside your confusion
and take the reward.

rows.label: qev091603_JNK0020
rows.name: Protest

rows.label: qev091603_SEL0021
rows.name:
Explain that the Murderess
threatened to break your knees.

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0009
rows.name:
Wonderful! Thanks for your
hard work. It's always nice
to see BLADEs work together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0010
rows.name: Here's your share of the reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0011
rows.name:
She said you could have
everything but the credits.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0012
rows.name: Heh... Of course she did...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0013
rows.name:
And now that we've been paid, there's no
process for us to contest it, is there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0014
rows.name:
Contest...it? No, everything
appears to be in order.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0015
rows.name: Did something happen between you two?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0016
rows.name: Forget it. Just...forget it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0017
rows.name: Goodness! That sounds serious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0018
rows.name:
Although she DID provide your portion of
the reward, and you don't appear hurt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0019
rows.name:
From a contractual standpoint,
I don't see an issue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0020
rows.name:
Which was all part of
her plan, I'm sure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0021
rows.name: In any case, here's your reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0022
rows.name: I notice she took all the credits...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0023
rows.name:
She told me to give you
everything but the cash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0024
rows.name: Is that an issue?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0025
rows.name:
Forget it. I don't know
why I'm even surprised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0026
rows.name:
Oh, right. She left a
message with it, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0027
rows.name:
I bet. She just can't resist
rubbing my face in it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0028_m
rows.name:
It's not for you, Iriina.
It's for your friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0028_f
rows.name:
It's not for you, Iriina.
It's for your friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0029
rows.name:
"Stop by anytime. I'm always
game for another adventure."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0030
rows.name:
Then she asked me to wink,
but...I don't think so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0031
rows.name:
You just got yourself
the world's worst fan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0032
rows.name: Welcome back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'm so relieved you completed that
resource collection assignment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0034
rows.name: Huh? Sorry, what?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0035
rows.name:
You were working with the
Murderess on a mission, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0036
rows.name: Kind of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0037
rows.name:
Well, she just came by and picked up the
reward without delivering the goods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0038
rows.name:
She said you'd bring them
by. Gave her word on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0039
rows.name:
I told her that was against regulations,
but you know how she is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0040
rows.name:
Anyway, I've been sweating bullets
worried that you might not show![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0041
rows.name: I will strangle her scrawny little...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0042
rows.name: Pardon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0043
rows.name: Nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0044
rows.name:
She got us good this time. Us
and those idiots she recruited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0045
rows.name:
Next time let's do a real mission,
all right? One with standards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0046
rows.name:
One that has nothing to do
with that little princess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091603_MSG0047
rows.name:
I bet. She just can't resist
rubbing my face in it...[ST:wait ]
